tiers.name: Meeting House
tiers.description: A humble hall where townsfolk gather to settle disputes and make communal decisions
manualEffects: Supports: Society

tiers.name: Town Hall
tiers.description: The organized seat of local leadership, housing records, officials, and civic meetings
manualEffects: Supports: Society, Diplomacy

tiers.name: Council Chambers
tiers.description: A stately building where magistrates and advisors convene to deliberate policy and law
manualEffects: Supports: Society, Diplomacy, Deception
Leaders may retrain skill proficiencies and skill feats for supported skills (1 week downtime)

tiers.name: Royal Court
tiers.description: The grand seat of royal authority, where nobles gather to debate governance, justice, and decree
manualEffects: Supports: Society, Diplomacy, Deception
Reroll 1 failed skill check per turn
Leaders may retrain skill proficiencies and skill feats for supported skills (1 week downtime)

tiers.description: Simple open-air ring for combat practice and weapons training

families.description: Tier progression for Performance and Culture

tiers.name: Busker's Row
tiers.description: Street performers and traveling entertainers
manualEffects: Supports: Performance

tiers.name: Minstrel's Stage
tiers.description: Small raised platform for organized shows
manualEffects: Supports: Performance, Diplomacy

tiers.name: Theater
tiers.description: Professional indoor performance venue
manualEffects: Supports: Performance, Diplomacy, Lore
Leaders may retrain skill proficiencies and skill feats for supported skills (1 week downtime)

tiers.name: Grand Opera House
tiers.description: Elite venue for legendary performers
manualEffects: Supports: Performance, Diplomacy, Lore
Reroll 1 failed skill check per turn
Leaders may retrain skill proficiencies and skill feats for supported skills (1 week downtime)
Leaders may retrain class feats: Bard, Swashbuckler, Exemplar

tiers.name: Market Square
tiers.description: Basic marketplace for trade and commerce
manualEffects: +1 Kingdom Wealth
Sell resources at 3:1 (3 resources → 1 gold)
Purchase resources at 3:1 (3 gold → 1 resource)
Purchase non-magical items up to settlement level

tiers.name: Bazaar
tiers.description: Expansive marketplace with magical goods
manualEffects: +2 Kingdom Wealth
Sell resources at 2:1 (2 resources → 1 gold)
Purchase resources at 2:1 (2 gold → 1 resource)
Purchase non-magical items up to settlement level
Purchase scrolls and consumables up to settlement level

tiers.name: Merchant Guild
tiers.description: Organized merchant consortium with improved rates
manualEffects: +3 Kingdom Wealth
Sell resources at 3:2 (3 resources → 2 gold)
Purchase resources at 3:2 (3 gold → 2 resources)
Purchase magical items up to settlement level

tiers.name: Imperial Bank
tiers.description: Grand financial institution with optimal rates
manualEffects: +4 Kingdom Wealth
Sell resources at 1:1 (1 resource → 1 gold)
Purchase resources at 1:1 (1 gold → 1 resource)
Purchase magical items up to settlement level

tiers.name: Envoy's Office
tiers.description: Basic diplomatic office for foreign relations

tiers.name: Embassy
tiers.description: Formal embassy for establishing stronger foreign ties

tiers.name: Grand Embassy
tiers.description: Prestigious embassy that enhances international reputation

tiers.name: Diplomatic Quarter
tiers.description: Entire district dedicated to international diplomacy
manualEffects: At the start of each Kingdom Turn, reduce Unrest by 1

tiers.name: Granary
tiers.description: Basic grain storage facility

tiers.name: Storehouses
tiers.description: Multiple storage buildings for food preservation

tiers.name: Warehouses
tiers.description: Large-scale storage facilities with climate control

tiers.name: Strategic Reserves
tiers.description: Massive storage complex with advanced preservation
manualEffects: Once per Kingdom Turn, roll flat check DC 15; on success, negate a spoilage/loss event affecting Food

tiers.name: Wooden Palisade
tiers.description: Basic wooden defensive barrier
manualEffects: Defending armies in this settlement gain +1 AC

tiers.name: Stone Walls
tiers.description: Solid stone defensive walls
manualEffects: Defending armies in this settlement gain +1 AC and +1 effective level

tiers.name: Fortified Walls
tiers.description: Heavily reinforced defensive fortifications
manualEffects: Defending armies in this settlement gain +1 AC and +2 effective level

tiers.name: Grand Battlements
tiers.description: Massive defensive structures with advanced defensive positions
manualEffects: Defending armies in this settlement gain +2 AC and +3 effective level
Defenders located in this settlement recover each turn as long as the city has food

tiers.name: Dive Bar
tiers.description: Rough drinking establishment for frontier folk
manualEffects: PCs in this settlement gain +1 to checks made to reduce Unrest

tiers.name: Public House
tiers.description: Medieval-style communal drinking hall
manualEffects: PCs in this settlement gain +2 to checks made to reduce Unrest

tiers.name: Respectable Tavern
tiers.description: Well-maintained establishment serving quality food and drink
manualEffects: PCs in this settlement gain +2 to checks made to reduce Unrest

tiers.name: Pleasure Palace
tiers.description: Luxurious indoor entertainment complex with opulent amenities
manualEffects: At the start of each Kingdom Turn, gain +1 Fame and reduce Unrest by 1
PCs in this settlement gain +2 to checks made to reduce Unrest

tiers.name: Stocks
tiers.description: Basic detention facility for troublemakers

tiers.name: Jail
tiers.description: Secure holding facility for criminals

tiers.name: Prison
tiers.description: Large detention complex with rehabilitation options

tiers.name: Donjon
tiers.description: Fortress-like prison with advanced security
manualEffects: Once per turn, automatically converts 1 regular Unrest to imprisoned Unrest

tiers.name: Barracks
tiers.description: Basic military housing for troops

tiers.name: Garrison
tiers.description: Fortified military quarters for larger forces

tiers.name: Fortress
tiers.description: Heavily defended military installation

tiers.name: Citadel
tiers.description: Imposing fortress that projects military might
manualEffects: At the start of each Kingdom Turn, reduce Unrest by 1

tiers.name: Tax Office
tiers.description: Basic tax collection office
manualEffects: +1 Kingdom Wealth

tiers.name: Counting House
tiers.description: Organized financial institution for tax collection
manualEffects: +2 Kingdom Wealth

tiers.name: Treasury
tiers.description: Comprehensive treasury for managing kingdom finances
manualEffects: +3 Kingdom Wealth
Personal Income uses Tier 3 income level

tiers.name: Exchequer
tiers.description: Grand financial institution managing kingdom wealth
manualEffects: +4 Kingdom Wealth
Personal Income uses Tier 4 income level
